5. Major Requirements (effective Spring 2025)

(C- or higher, regular grading option)

____ Natural Science Non-Lab or Lab – DSNS/DSNL (3/4)

** Scholarship in Practice – DSSP (satisfied by BMGT495)

c. Signature Courses (can overlap w/ Dist. Studies and/or Diversity)

___ BMGT302 Essential Programming Skills for Bus Analytics (3) (CMSC 132 Object-Oriented Prog II or INST326 Object-Oriented Prog for Info Sci can substitute) ___ BMGT402 Database Systems (3) (CMSC424 Database Design or INST327 Database Design & Modeling can substitute) ___ BMGT403 Systems Analysis and Design (3) ___ BMGT407 Information Systems Projects (3)

Big Question – SCIS (3)

Big Question – SCIS (3)

d. Diversity (can overlap w/ Dist. Studies and/or Signature Courses)

Understanding Plural Societies – DVUP (3)

Complete 2 elective courses (6 credits) from List A or one elective course from List A and one elective course from List B Students interested in BS/MS (Plus 1) for MSIS or MSBA should discuss their course selections with an advisor to maximize their double counting credits.

Underst. Plural Soc./Cultural Competence – DVUP/DVCC (1-3)
